name: theme-x-demo
description: Theme X uses Hugo's native routing to generate custom functional pages. Because a theme should never force content onto your site, you must opt-in to these pages by creating a simple `_index.md` file in your site's `content` folder.

scripts.test:e2e: start-server-and-test 'npx serve public -l tcp://127.0.0.1:1315' http://127.0.0.1:1315 'npx playwright test --grep @structure'
